message:
fix(conformance): text format parity for blocked command output

- Update blocked.rs to match bd's text output format:
  - Use 🚫 emoji in header: "🚫 Blocked issues (N):"
  - Update priority format to [● PN]
  - Align indentation and bullet style with bd
- Improve extract_id_from_create in conformance_text_output.rs:
  - Handle both br format ("Created ID: Title") and
    bd format ("✓ Created issue: ID")
- Update beads tracking file

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
